## Naming pattern

`{{ .Chart.Name }}` — resources use the chart name directly. No env suffix in Kubernetes resource names; environment is separated by Kubernetes namespace (`notifyapi-prod`).

## Dependency graph

**Upstream (notifyapi depends on):**
- SQS queue `notifyapi-prod-inbound` — primary message source
- SMTP relay `smtp.internal:587` — email delivery
- AWS SES (fallback for bulk sends)

**Downstream (depends on notifyapi):**
- No known consumers; notifyapi is a terminal processor
